/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O2 -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -shared  -o /home/daniel/Desktop/approximate_ecc/_ecc_cpp.cpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/_ecc_cpp.dir/cpp/src/feistel_perm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_ecc_cpp.dir/cpp/src/grid_shuffle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_ecc_cpp.dir/cpp/src/group_hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_ecc_cpp.dir/cpp/src/hash_dag.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_ecc_cpp.dir/cpp/src/bitflip_solver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_ecc_cpp.dir/cpp/src/bindings.cpp.o
